commit.subject: LU-0000 tests: catch eviction bugs
commit.message:
LU-0000 tests: catch eviction bugs

v2_6_93 + LU-6154 - good.

v2_7_50 - good.

v2_7_58 - keep hitting LU-6846; need LU-7419 to apply LU-6846.

v2_7_58 + LU-6846(patch 16333 and 15730) + LU-7419 - good.

v2_7_59 + LU-6846(patch 16333) + LU-7419 + revert LU-4865 - good.

v2_7_60 + LU-7419 + revert LU-4865 - good.

v2_7_60_0-24-g7d31575 + LU-7419 + revert LU-4865 - good.

v2_7_61 + LU-7419 + revert LU-4865 - good.

v2_7_61_0-38-g10ebe81 + LU-7419 + revert LU-4865 - good.

v2_7_62 + LU-7419 + revert LU-4865 + revert LU-7153 - ?

v2_7_62 + LU-7419 + revert LU-4865 - bad.

v2_7_62 + LU-7419 + revert LU-4865 + revert LU-6155 - bad.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly
Signed-off-by: Jinshan Xiong <jinshan.xiong@intel.com>
Change-Id: I49e810038337c024ebb8539b731d45a75a7857b3
